seo_title: Tennis | Los Cab Sports Club — 17 Premier Courts in Fountain Valley
seo_description: Play tennis at Los Cab — 17 courts, junior academies, after-school programs, and adult leagues in Fountain Valley, CA.
hero_subtitle: From junior academies to competitive adult leagues — Los Cab offers a complete tennis experience for every age and level.

programs.title: Junior Tennis Academy
programs.desc: A structured development pathway for young players. Age-appropriate training covering technique, match play, sportsmanship, and competitive tournament preparation.

programs.title: After School Academy
programs.desc: Afternoon programs that blend tennis instruction with fun activity after a school day. Designed to keep kids active, engaged, and developing their game.

programs.title: Adult Beginner & Intermediate
programs.desc: New to tennis or want to build a stronger foundation? Group clinics and private lessons are available for adult beginners through intermediate players.

programs.title: Competitive Leagues & Drilling
programs.desc: Year-round league play, round-robins, and advanced drilling clinics for competitive adults. Challenge your game and meet other serious players.

programs.title: Private Lessons
programs.desc: One-on-one sessions with our certified teaching professionals. Personalized attention accelerates improvement at any age or level.

programs.title: Open Court Play
programs.desc: Members can reserve courts online and enjoy open play throughout the day and evening. 17 courts mean you'll almost always find availability.

courts_subtitle: Our tennis facility features premium court surfaces, lighting for evening play, and a welcoming atmosphere for players of every level.

court_features.title: 17 Total Courts
court_features.text: Multiple court surfaces with excellent drainage and maintenance, ensuring great play conditions year-round.

court_features.title: Night Lighting
court_features.text: Illuminated courts mean you can play before work, after work, or on weekends after sunset.

court_features.title: Pro Shop
court_features.text: On-site pro shop for racquet stringing, equipment, and accessories.

court_features.title: Cabana Access
court_features.text: Private courtyard cabanas available to tennis members for a premium relaxation after play.

membership_details: $500 Initiation Fee · Includes all Pickleball & Sports benefits
